metaphor: one recurring visual world that carries the whole film, e.g. a paper factory line
cta: brand + one-line call to action on the final frame

scenes.idea: one sentence stating the single idea of the scene
scenes.action: one physical paper action that shows the pain
scenes.voice: 旁白短句，逗号分隔的短语
scenes.joke: the one spoken joke (escalation / literal metaphor / dry refusal / contrast / button line)
scenes.label: 2-4 word burned-in label

scenes.idea: the product arrives as a physical intervention in that world
scenes.action: product slides in and changes the scene
scenes.label: burned-in label

scenes.idea: prove one capability through a paper action, not a feature card
scenes.label: burned-in label

scenes.idea: turn the trust/privacy claim into a memorable visual event
scenes.action: a decisive physical beat, e.g. a door closing on the cloud
scenes.label: burned-in label

scenes.idea: resolve the world into one clean brand and CTA frame
scenes.voice: 旁白短句 + 短促收尾 tag
scenes.label: brand + CTA
